uniques.name: Wyrm-Scale Aegis
uniques.desc: Forged from the scales of a Procrastination Wyrm. Its bearer never delays.
uniques.flavorText: Every task you postpone feeds the wyrm.

uniques.name: Ember of the Colossus
uniques.desc: A shard of living flame from the heart of the Burnout Colossus.
uniques.flavorText: Rest is not weakness. It is the fuel for greater fire.

uniques.name: Crown of Clarity
uniques.desc: Worn by those who silenced the Chaos Hydra's many voices.
uniques.flavorText: Focus is the blade that cuts through chaos.

uniques.name: Voidforged Edge
uniques.desc: A blade tempered in the depths of the mythic rift. It hungers for challenge.
uniques.flavorText: The deeper you go, the sharper it becomes.

uniques.name: Striders of the Abyss
uniques.desc: Boots that walked the endless depths and returned.
uniques.flavorText: Each step echoes in the void.

uniques.name: Jeweler's Diadem
uniques.desc: A crown set with prismatic gems that amplify all socketed stones.
uniques.flavorText: Every facet reflects a different truth.
